name: sos2526-21
description: **Team:**  [Ivan Arriaza Dominguez](https://github.com/ivan7112)          [Daniel De La Rosa Fernandez](https://github.com/XJD5067)          [María Torres Chacón](https://github.com/MariaTorresChacon)   **Project description:** Our project explores the relationship between religious beliefs, AIDS deaths, and cholera statistics.   **Repository:** [SOS2526-21]( https://github.com/gti-sos/SOS2526-21)

scripts.test-api-local: npx newman run tests/api/test-religious-believes-stats.json -e tests/api/api-test-env-local.json && npx newman run tests/api/test-aids-deaths-stats.json -e tests/api/api-ddlrf-env-local.json && npx newman run tests/api/test-cholera-stats.json -e tests/api/api-test-env-local.json
scripts.test-api-online: npx newman run tests/api/test-religious-believes-stats.json -e tests/api/api-test-env-render.json && npx newman run tests/api/test-aids-deaths-stats.json -e tests/api/api-ddlrf-env-render.json && npx newman run tests/api/test-cholera-stats.json -e tests/api/api-test-env-render.json
scripts.build: cd src/frontend && npm run build && cd .. && cd frontend-react && npm run build

author: Ivan AD, Daniel DLRF, Maria TC
